extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won the 35km flat time trial by one second over THOMAS Geraint, regaining the maglia rosa with 45-second GC advantage.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco paced positive split strategy, slower than KEMNA Leonard early but accelerating through finish to edge THOMAS Geraint.
ROGLIC Primoz deliberately negative split after slow start, pulling back 30+ seconds on KEMNA Leonard in final sections.
HART Tao delivered career-best TT, beating KUNG Stefan by 2 seconds despite being primarily a climber, signals unexpected strength.
THOMAS Geraint and HART Tao finished within 3 seconds, revealing INEOS depth on flat TTs despite climber profiles.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Won by fraction with positive split pacing, now holds 45-second GC lead after Stage 9
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Lost by one second but showed TT form rivals specialist EVENEPOEL Remco on pan-flat parcours
rider_signals.HART Tao: positive: Career-best TT performance, third place signals evolved diesel engine capability beyond pure climbing
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Negative split strategy effective but lost time to THOMAS Geraint and EVENEPOEL Remco despite Olympic TT pedigree
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: negative: Fourth at 4 seconds as specialist on flat 35km course reveals declining TT dominance
